pages.text: Two separate civic systems.$(br2)A $(bold)faction$() binds an FTB Teams party to one of three regions ($(l:factions/desert)Desert$(/l), $(l:factions/island)Island$(/l), $(l:factions/knight)Knight$(/l)). The party owner crafts regalia other party members cannot. One party per faction, one faction per party.$(br2)An $(bold)office$() is an independent civic seat ($(l:factions/offices)Chancellor, Treasurer, Judge$(/l)), capped at one holder each. Holders craft regalia exclusive to that seat. Office assignment is independent of faction membership.$(br2)$(bold)/cabafaction claim <desert|island|knight>.$() Party owner only. Binds the party to a faction.$(br2)$(bold)/cabafaction release.$() Party owner only. Releases the binding.$(br2)$(bold)/cabafaction info.$() Any party member. Shows the current faction.
